originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Fusing Kernels and Cleaning Code for Puffer 5 State-Set Curriculum
summary: Worked on cleaning up and optimizing the new state-set-based curriculum algorithm (Puffer 5) for sparse-reward tasks. Fused sampling and importance-weight kernels, reduced code size to ~500 lines, and validated performance on 35x35 sparse mazes and breakout benchmarks.
